lifecycle.active: Active runtime skill; eligible for normal use.
lifecycle.workflow: Workflow-only entrypoint; not part of random rotation.
lifecycle.nested: Nested helper skill; address directly, do not rotate globally.
lifecycle.experimental: Visible experimental skill; may be sampled intentionally.
lifecycle.catalog: Catalog skill; available but not active by default.
lifecycle.incubating: Workshop or staging skill under evaluation.
lifecycle.backlog: Queued for later cleanup or promotion.
lifecycle.archived: Retired; never surface in normal discovery.
